note: Joins two things: "el cafe y el te". Say "ee".
Sets up a contrast: "me gusta el cafe pero no el te".
Gives a reason: "...porque me gusta". One word; "por que" (two words) is the question "why?".
"me too" = "yo tambien". Often starts the sentence: "tambien hablo ingles".
Strengthens a word: "muy bien" = very well.
Softens it: "hablo un poco de español" = I speak a little Spanish.
